title: scutellaria mollis
intro: Scutellaria mollis, also known as Chinese skullcap, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chinese skullcap include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Chinese skullcap is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also available in dried form for use in infusions and decoctions.
